---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the ERP system
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "Currently, users cannot [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe a specific use case for this feature:
1. User role: [e.g., accountant, warehouse manager, dealer]
2. Current workflow:
3. How this feature would improve the workflow:

## Module Affected
Which ERP module(s) would this feature impact?
- [ ] Accounting
- [ ] Inventory
- [ ] Sales
- [ ] Purchasing
- [ ] HR/Payroll
- [ ] Manufacturing
- [ ] Portal
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Business Value
How would this feature benefit the business?
- [ ] Saves time
- [ ] Reduces errors
- [ ] Improves data accuracy
- [ ] Enhances compliance
- [ ] Improves user experience
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Priority
- [ ] Must have - Critical for business operations
- [ ] Should have - Important but not critical
- [ ] Nice to have - Would be beneficial

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Technical Considerations
If you have technical insights about implementation:
- Affected entities/tables:
- Integration points:
- Performance considerations:
- Security considerations:
